O0110F1A Therapies: Invasive Mechanical Ventilator (Admis) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received invasive mechanical ventilator treatment days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
